files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language
Added tsx extension mapping and supported language entry

compile_belief_reason: All four insertion points match the established patterns exactly: tsx arm in get_language_info reuses typescript:: queries with LANGUAGE_TSX constant; tsx arm in get_ts_language mirrors typescript arm with LANGUAGE_TSX; extension map entry follows identical cfg-gated tuple pattern; supported_languages entry follows identical cfg-gated string pattern. No new pub mod declaration added (shared with typescript). LANGUAGE_TSX is the correct constant for the JSX variant.
